summary: Full E2E testing of Venue Acquisition Workflow completed. Backend: All 26 API tests passed (create, update, media, submit, review-queue, approve, request_changes, reject). Frontend: Specialist dashboard loads with stats, venue form works (7-step wizard), VAM dashboard shows review queue, VAM can view and approve venues. Approval publishes venue to main venues collection.

minor.issue: Response message has typo: 'Venue request changesd' instead of 'Venue request changes'

backend_create_venue_draft.detail: POST /api/venue-onboarding/create - creates draft with vonb_ prefix ID

backend_add_photo_media.detail: POST /api/venue-onboarding/{id}/media - adds photo with media_ prefix ID

backend_vam_approve.detail: PATCH /api/venue-onboarding/{id}/review action=approve - publishes to main venues

backend_vam_request_changes.detail: PATCH /api/venue-onboarding/{id}/review action=request_changes - allows specialist to edit and re-submit

backend_vam_reject.detail: PATCH /api/venue-onboarding/{id}/review action=reject - marks venue as rejected

backend_venue_published.detail: After approval, venue appears in main venues collection via GET /api/venues/city/{slug}/{venue_id}

backend_specialist_stats.detail: GET /api/venue-onboarding/stats - returns drafts, submitted, approved, changes_requested, rejected counts

frontend_specialist_dashboard.detail: Loads at /team/dashboard with stats (Drafts, In Review, Approved, Changes) and Quick Actions

frontend_venue_form.detail: 7-step wizard works: Basic Info, Location, Capacity, Features, Media, Owner Contact, Review & Submit

frontend_venue_form_auto_save.detail: Form auto-saves on step transitions, shows 'Saved' toast

frontend_vam_dashboard.detail: Loads at /team/vam/dashboard with stats and pending review venues

frontend_vam_review_page.detail: Shows venue details with Approve, Request Changes, Reject buttons

frontend_vam_approve_flow.detail: Clicking Approve shows 'Venue Approved' toast and redirects to dashboard

action_items: Fix typo in /api/venue-onboarding/{id}/review response: 'request changesd' → 'request changes'

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All specialist and VAM flows working

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed venues created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue Acquisition E2E workflow fully tested. Specialist creates venue draft → adds media → submits → VAM reviews (approve/changes_requested/reject) → approved venues publish to main venues collection. All frontend dashboards (Specialist at /team/dashboard with My Venues, VAM at /team/vam/dashboard with Review Queue) working correctly. The 7-step venue form wizard auto-saves on each step. Stats endpoints correctly count venues by status.
